Darius.trading_pattern: Darius Q bleed is oppressive early. Your wind wall blocks his Q. Trade EQ when safe.
Darius.ability_to_dodge: His Q outer ring bleed — use wind wall to block it completely.
Darius.early_game: Darius dominates early. Use wind wall to block Q. Trade EQ combos.
Darius.mid_game: Your crit and wind wall help. His ult is deadly — ult away if needed.
Darius.late_game: You outscale through crit and mobility. He struggles if you space.
Darius.win_condition: Use wind wall to block Q. Trade EQ combos. Scale into crit.
Darius.scaling: You outscale through crit and mobility.
Darius.positioning: Use wind wall defensively. Trade EQ. Space carefully.

Garen.trading_pattern: Garen Q silence stops your combos. Your wind wall blocks his silence. Trade carefully.
Garen.ability_to_dodge: His Q silence — use wind wall to reduce its effect. Move away.
Garen.early_game: Garen dominates early. Use wind wall defensively. Trade EQ.
Garen.mid_game: Your crit scales. His tankiness improves. Avoid extended fights.
Garen.late_game: You outscale through crit. Garen scales too but you're more mobile.
Garen.win_condition: Use wind wall defensively. Trade EQ. Scale into crit.
Garen.scaling: You outscale through crit and mobility.
Garen.positioning: Use wind wall. Trade EQ. Space carefully.

Fiora.trading_pattern: Fiora's parry shuts down your damage. Your wind wall doesn't help. Avoid close fights.
Fiora.ability_to_dodge: Her parry W — move away before she parries. Don't trade into her.
Fiora.early_game: Fiora's parry dominates. Avoid fights. Trade from range when possible.
Fiora.mid_game: Your crit scales. Her split push is strong. Avoid dueling her.
Fiora.late_game: You outscale through crit. Fiora struggles if you avoid 1v1.
Fiora.win_condition: Avoid her parry. Scale into crit. Never duel her.
Fiora.scaling: You outscale through crit and mobility.
Fiora.positioning: Avoid her parry. Trade from range. Never duel.

Jax.trading_pattern: Jax's E stun is oppressive. Your wind wall and mobility help. Trade and move around.
Jax.ability_to_dodge: His E stun counter — move away before he engages. Use mobility.
Jax.early_game: Jax dominates early. Use mobility to avoid E. Trade EQ when safe.
Jax.mid_game: Your crit scales. His dueling is strong. Avoid close extended fights.
Jax.late_game: You outscale through crit. Jax struggles if you kite.
Jax.win_condition: Use mobility to avoid E. Trade EQ. Scale into crit.
Jax.scaling: You outscale through crit and mobility.
Jax.positioning: Use mobility defensively. Trade EQ. Avoid extended fights.

Riven.trading_pattern: Riven's combo vs your wind wall is a skill matchup. Trade EQ when her Q is down.
Riven.ability_to_dodge: Her Q dash — use wind wall to block damage. Move away.
Riven.early_game: Trade EQ when her Q is down. Use wind wall to block. Respect her damage.
Riven.mid_game: Both scale similarly. Your wind wall helps. Trade around cooldowns.
Riven.late_game: You outscale through crit. Both mobile.
Riven.win_condition: Use wind wall to block her Q. Trade EQ. Scale into crit.
Riven.positioning: Use wind wall to block Q. Trade EQ. Respect damage.

Aatrox.trading_pattern: Aatrox Q range is massive. Your wind wall blocks partial damage. Trade from range.
Aatrox.ability_to_dodge: His Q skillshots — use wind wall to block. Move sideways.
Aatrox.early_game: Aatrox Q dominates. Use wind wall to block. Trade from distance.
Aatrox.mid_game: Your crit scales. His all-in is still strong. Avoid extended fights.
Aatrox.late_game: You outscale through crit. He falls off.
Aatrox.win_condition: Use wind wall to block Q. Trade from range. Scale into crit.
Aatrox.positioning: Use wind wall. Trade from range. Avoid extended fights.

Mordekaiser.trading_pattern: Mordekaiser's all-in is oppressive. Your wind wall doesn't help. Use mobility.
Mordekaiser.ability_to_dodge: His E pull — move away or use mobility before he pulls.
Mordekaiser.early_game: Mordekaiser dominates. Use mobility to avoid E. Trade from distance.
Mordekaiser.mid_game: Your crit scales. His ult can isolate. Avoid 1v1s.
Mordekaiser.late_game: You outscale through crit. He struggles grouped.
Mordekaiser.win_condition: Use mobility to avoid E. Trade from range. Group for fights.
Mordekaiser.positioning: Use mobility defensively. Trade from range. Group for fights.

Nasus.trading_pattern: Nasus has zero early game. Your EQ combos dominate. Trade aggressively.
Nasus.ability_to_dodge: His W wither — move away or use mobility. Your EQ is stronger.
Nasus.early_game: Dominate with EQ combos. Nasus is helpless. Build a massive lead.
Nasus.mid_game: Your lead carries. His stacking helps. Use mobility to kite.
Nasus.late_game: His stacks scale. You outscale through crit. Maintain distance.
Nasus.win_condition: Dominate early with EQ. Build lead. Kite late.
Nasus.scaling: He outscales through stacks — you through crit.
Nasus.positioning: Trade aggressively early. Kite late. Use mobility.

Sion.trading_pattern: Sion's Q poke is strong. Your wind wall blocks it. Trade EQ combos.
Sion.ability_to_dodge: His Q slow — use wind wall to block it.
Sion.early_game: Trade EQ combos. Use wind wall to block Q.
Sion.mid_game: Both scale. Your wind wall helps. Trade around cooldowns.
Sion.win_condition: Use wind wall to block Q. Trade EQ. Scale into crit.
Sion.positioning: Use wind wall. Trade EQ. Respect tankiness.

Malphite.trading_pattern: Malphite is tanky but low damage. Your wind wall helps. Trade EQ gradually.
Malphite.ability_to_dodge: His E shockwave — use wind wall to block it.
Malphite.early_game: Malphite is hard to kill. Trade EQ. Use wind wall.
Malphite.mid_game: Your crit scales. His tankiness improves. Avoid extended fights.
Malphite.win_condition: Use wind wall to block E. Trade EQ. Scale into crit.
Malphite.positioning: Use wind wall. Trade EQ. Respect tankiness.

Kayle.trading_pattern: Kayle's early range is limited. Your EQ combos are strong. Trade aggressively.
Kayle.ability_to_dodge: Her R invincibility — don't commit when she ults.
Kayle.early_game: Dominate with EQ combos. Kayle's range is limited.
Kayle.mid_game: Her range extends. Your crit scales. Trade carefully.
Kayle.late_game: She scales well. You outscale through crit.
Kayle.win_condition: Dominate early with EQ. Build lead. Scale into crit.
Kayle.scaling: Even — both scale well late game.
Kayle.positioning: Trade EQ aggressively early. Scale into crit.

Yorick.trading_pattern: Yorick's ghouls are oppressive. Your EQ mobility helps. Trade and move.
Yorick.ability_to_dodge: His E cage — use mobility to avoid or move sideways.
Yorick.early_game: Yorick's ghouls zone you. Use mobility to trade. Avoid extended.
Yorick.mid_game: Your crit scales. His maiden is strong. Avoid dueling.
Yorick.win_condition: Use mobility to trade. Avoid cage. Scale into crit.
Yorick.positioning: Use mobility. Trade EQ. Avoid maiden.

Illaoi.trading_pattern: Illaoi's E test is devastating. Your mobility helps kite. Trade from range.
Illaoi.ability_to_dodge: Her E tentacle test — use mobility to move away from her.
Illaoi.early_game: Illaoi's tentacles zone you. Use mobility to trade. Avoid E.
Illaoi.mid_game: Your crit scales. Her tentacles zone. Trade carefully.
Illaoi.late_game: You outscale through crit. Avoid tentacles.
Illaoi.win_condition: Use mobility to trade. Avoid E test. Scale into crit.
Illaoi.positioning: Use mobility. Space from tentacles. Trade EQ.

Camille.trading_pattern: Camille's E hook is oppressive. Your wind wall doesn't block it. Use mobility.
Camille.ability_to_dodge: Her E hook — use mobility to move away before she hooks.
Camille.early_game: Camille dominates. Use mobility to avoid E. Trade when safe.
Camille.mid_game: Your crit scales. Her dueling is strong. Avoid close fights.
Camille.late_game: You outscale through crit. Avoid dueling.
Camille.win_condition: Use mobility to avoid E. Trade EQ. Scale into crit.
Camille.positioning: Use mobility defensively. Trade EQ. Avoid E.

Olaf.early_game: Olaf's poke dominates. Use wind wall. Trade with mobility.
Olaf.mid_game: Your crit scales. His R makes him unkiteable. Avoid extended.
Olaf.late_game: You outscale through crit. Avoid his ult.
Olaf.win_condition: Use wind wall. Trade with mobility. Scale into crit.
Olaf.positioning: Use wind wall. Use mobility. Avoid Q slow.

Ornn.trading_pattern: Ornn's W brittle is oppressive. Your wind wall doesn't help much. Use mobility.
Ornn.ability_to_dodge: His E charge — use mobility to move away before he charges.
Ornn.early_game: Ornn dominates. Use mobility to avoid E. Trade when safe.
Ornn.mid_game: Your crit scales. His tankiness improves. Avoid extended fights.
Ornn.late_game: You outscale through crit. His upgrades are annoying.
Ornn.win_condition: Use mobility to avoid E. Trade EQ. Scale into crit.

Maokai.ability_to_dodge: His W pull — use mobility to move away before he pulls.
Maokai.early_game: Maokai's poke is strong. Use mobility to trade. Avoid W.
Maokai.mid_game: Your crit scales. His tankiness improves. Avoid extended fights.
Maokai.win_condition: Use mobility to avoid W. Trade EQ. Scale into crit.

Gnar.ability_to_dodge: His E hop — use mobility to move away from him.
Gnar.early_game: Gnar's ranged poke dominates. Use mobility to trade. Don't extend.
Gnar.mid_game: Your crit scales. His mega form is scary. Avoid him.
Gnar.late_game: You outscale through crit. Avoid his mega.
Gnar.win_condition: Use mobility to trade. Avoid mega form. Scale into crit.

Volibear.ability_to_dodge: His R storm dive — use wind wall to block or mobility to move.
Volibear.early_game: Volibear dominates. Use mobility to avoid W. Trade when safe.
Volibear.mid_game: Your crit scales. His tankiness improves. Avoid extended fights.
Volibear.late_game: You outscale through crit. Avoid his all-in.
Volibear.win_condition: Use mobility to avoid W. Trade EQ. Scale into crit.
